abilities.name: Down, Boy!
abilities.description: Does not flip for friendly Hound characters when determining random target when entering engagement range.

abilities.name: My Dogs Are Hungry!
abilities.description: Friendly Hounds within a6 may declare the (2) Charge Action as a (1) Action.

actions: (1) Barbed Whip (Flexible) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/4 damage. Crow Motivation: After succeeding, move target 1 yard if this attack dealt Weak damage, 2 yards if Moderate or Severe.
(1) Collier Navy (Pistol) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2.
system.notes: Guild's first Huntmasters. Control packs of trained Hounds. Coordinate with Guard Dogs.
